name: Tom Perez
subject: re: the Voting Rights Act (add your name)
body:
Stand with Democrats against Republican attacks on our voting rights
---
**Today is the anniversary of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, but Trump and Republicans at every level continue to target our right to vote.

Commit to standing with Democrats who will fight to protect our voting rights:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Right-to-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170806_tp_nd&source=em_20170806_tp_nd")**

Derek --

On this day 52 years ago, during the peak of the Civil Rights Movement, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law, enshrining the right to vote as the most fundamental right in our democracy.

Nearly fifty years later, the Supreme Court struck down some of the VRA's most important protections -- and Republicans jumped at the chance to limit access to the ballot box.

Our right to vote is under attack right now, more so than it has been in decades. Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and Kris Kobach -- the architect of some of the GOP's most extreme voting restrictions -- have embarked on a campaign to take those restrictions nationwide. They've created a "voter fraud" commission which has the sole purpose of inventing new ways to prevent American citizens from making our voices heard at the ballot box. It's disgraceful. It's un-American.

As Democrats, we won't rest until we've restored the Voting Rights Act and reversed the GOP's efforts to subvert our most important right.

**Add your name today and commit to this fight, Derek. Say you'll do everything you can to protect the right to vote for everyone:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Right-to-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170806_tp_nd&source=em_20170806_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230df/4067b0a/33d64deab/7e6c9423/1115433806/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170806_tp_nd&source=em_20170806_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230df/4067b0a/33d64deab/7e6c9420/1115433806/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170806_tp_nd&source=em_20170806_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230df/4067b0a/33d64deab/7e6c9421/1115433806/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170806_tp_nd&source=em_20170806_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230df/4067b0a/33d64deab/7e6c942e/1115433806/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170806_tp_nd&source=em_20170806_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: LegitAction Team
subject: ICYMI: When voting rights expanded [video]
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Fifty-two years ago today, the Voting Rights Act of 1965 went into
effect. Yet today our democracy faces its greatest crisis of
legitimacy in generations.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st_VRA_video/?t=1002&akid=191%2E356062%2E5m4jk9 ]If you haven’t watched it yet, check out this short video making
the case for the 21st Century Voting Rights Act today, then add your
name to the petition to show your support for reform.

Russ Feingold and thousands of members of LegitAction have joined
together to support a new 21st Century Voting Rights Act. Thank you
for joining with them.

LegitAction Team

------Original Message------
From: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
Subject: When voting rights expanded [video]

Friend,

On August 6, 1965, President Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into
law, one of the seminal achievements in the history of our democracy.

That anniversary is coming up in just two days. But instead of
celebrating everyone’s equal voice in our democracy this Sunday, we
will face a democracy rapidly losing its legitimacy as it is
undermined by voter ID laws, hyperpartisan gerrymandering, felon
disenfranchisement, and more.

That’s why Russ Feingold and thousands of members of LegitAction have
joined together to support a new 21st Century Voting Rights Act.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st_VRA_video/?t=1003&akid=191%2E356062%2E5m4jk9 ]Watch this short video making the case for the 21st Century Voting
Rights Act today, then add your name to the petition to show your
support for reform.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st_VRA_video/?t=1004&akid=191%2E356062%2E5m4jk9 ]Russ Feingold makes the case for the 21st Century Voting Rights Act

The right to vote is not a luxury or a reward, handed out by the
government as it sees fit. It is the most fundamental right of any
democracy, granting it legitimacy by instilling power in the people
and not in politicians.

Today, that fundamental right -- and that legitimacy -- are under
assault.

Courts this year found North Carolina’s hyperpartisan gerrymandering
targeted African-American voters “with almost surgical precision.”
Acquiring an ID to vote costs more today, even adjusting for
inflation, than poll taxes in the 60’s. And felon disenfranchisement
now bars 1 in 13 Black folks from their right to vote nationwide.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st_VRA_video/?t=1005&akid=191%2E356062%2E5m4jk9 ]We must keep building momentum to fix the voting rights abuses of
2017 with a 21st Century Voting Rights Act. Watch the video today,
then sign the petition.

This is a bold thing to demand at a time when it seems like the deck
is more stacked against us in Washington than ever. But solving big
challenges requires bold solutions, and we can’t let progressives and
Democrats in Congress turn away from that.

Thank you for supporting this important push,

Russ Feingold

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st_VRA_video/?t=1006&akid=191%2E356062%2E5m4jk9 ]TAKE ACTION »

Authorized and paid for by LegitAction, Inc.

PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562
